title: approvals — permissions
description: Permissions split across two guards. `sanctum` guard covers tenant users (viewers + admins + approvers). `platform_admin` guard covers Academorix ops staff (cross-tenant read + registry management). Approval decisions themselves use `approvals.instances.approve` — one permission covers both approve + reject because they're two sides of the same decision-authority.

permissions.name: approvals.instances.withdraw
permissions.description: Withdraw a pending instance the caller submitted.

permissions.name: approvals.instances.approve
permissions.description: Approve or reject an instance the caller is an approver on. NOT enough on its own — caller MUST additionally be in the specific requirement's resolved_approvers (enforced by caller_is_approver rule + approvals.enforce_approver middleware + ApprovalDecisionObserver).

permissions.name: approvals.decisions.view_comments
permissions.description: See the decision comments on the timeline. Members see decisions but comments are redacted to preserve reviewer discretion.

permissions.name: platform.approvals.actions.create
permissions.description: Break-glass — manually add a row to the approvable_actions registry. Rare; boot-time discovery handles the normal case.

permissions.name: platform.approvals.templates.viewAny
permissions.description: Cross-tenant template read. Compliance auditor use case.

permissions.name: platform.approvals.audit.generate
permissions.description: Generate cross-tenant compliance snapshots. SOC 2 + ISO 27001 evidence path.
